name: Coyote's Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together melted butter and milk until combined.
3. Add buttermilk or plain yogurt and whisk in egg yolks until blended.
4. Stir in honey.
5. In a separate bowl, sift together flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt, sugar, and cumin.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch cast-iron skillet or oven-safe baking dish.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow bread to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before turning off the heat and transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
